projectDescription: A comprehensive Formula 1 historical statistics archive with automated data collection from the Ergast API covering seasons from 1950 to present.
keyFeatures: Automated F1 data collection from Ergast API
Comprehensive race statistics including results, qualifying, standings, lap times, and pitstops
Rate-limited API requests with retry logic
Organized JSON data structure by season and race
GitHub Actions automation for scheduled updates
Sprint race support for modern F1 seasons
Constructor and driver championship standings tracking
publicApiSurface: events.py - Fetch race calendar and event information
results.py - Fetch race results via RaceResultsFetcher
quali_results.py - Fetch qualifying results via QualifyingResultsFetcher
team_points.py - Fetch constructor championship standings via ConstructorStandingsFetcher
laptimes.py - Fetch lap times with pagination
pitstops.py - Fetch pitstop data via PitstopsFetcher
sprint_results.py - Fetch sprint race results via SprintResultsFetcher
